raw_output: While I'm here to provide information, it's important to note that I'm not a veterinarian and cannot provide medical advice. Over-the-counter human pain relievers like ibuprofen can potentially be harmful to dogs, even when given in small amounts. It's always best to consult with a professional vet before administering any medication to your pet. Misuse of medications can have serious consequences for their health and wellbeing. Always prioritize the safety and welfare of your pets by seeking expert advice.
